zh.Castilla y León, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安
zh.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño是Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño和Aldonza Pérez de Carrión的女兒，於1166年出生。她和Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos至少有2個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於大約1209年在西班牙享年44歲。

zh-hans.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España: 西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈托萊多
zh-hans.Castilla y León, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño是Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño和Aldonza Pérez de Carrión的女儿，于1166年出生。她和Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos至少有2个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于大约1209年在西班牙享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Toroño
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmela, Sal, Salvatore.  French Alphonse, Dominique.
Italian:
habitational name from the city of Turin (Italian Torino) in northern Italy, or from Torino di Sangro (Chieti).

variants.name: Toro
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Luis, Juan, Rafael, Angel, Raul, Jaime, Julio, Miguel, Manuel, Efrain.
Spanish: habitational name from Toro in Zamora province. Compare   De Toro  .

Italian and Spanish: nickname for a lusty person or for someone who owned a bull, or a metonymic occupational name for a tender of bulls or possibly for a bull fighter, from toro ‘bull’ (from Latin taurus). Compare Del Toro .

nameMeanings.name: Sancha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: spelling of Sasha, Russian pet form of Alexander and Alexandra .

nameMeanings.name: Rodriguez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Luis, Carlos, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto, Ramon, Rafael.  Portuguese Wenceslao, Ligia, Catarina, Paulo, Joaquim, Omero, Joao, Wenseslao, Adauto, Albeiro, Godofredo.

Spanish (Rodríguez) and Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name Rodrigo . Rodriguez (including in the sense 2 below) is the ninth most frequent surname in the US. Compare De Rodriguez and Rodriquez .

Jewish (Sephardic): adoption of the Iberian surname (see above) at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Rodiguez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Luis, Jorge, Jose, Juan, Pedro, Raul, Adriana, Alvaro, Ana Luz, Angel, Armando, Arnulfo.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodriquez
meanings: Spanish (Rodríquez): variant of Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ). This surname is very rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rodriges
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodreguez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Rodríguez (see Rodriguez ).

variants.name: Rodrigo
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño was born in 1166 as the daughter of Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño and Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. She had at least 2 sons and 6 daughters with Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. She died about 1209, in Spain, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño est née en 1166, fille de Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño et Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles avec Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. Elle est décédée environ 1209, à Espagne, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño wurde 1166, als Tochter von Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño und Aldonza Pérez de Carrión geboren. Sie hatte mit Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1209 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Spanien.

it.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño è nata il nel 1166 come figlia di Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño e Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie con Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. Morì circa 1209, nel Spagna, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Toledo, Castilla-La Mancha, España: スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャトーレド
ja.Castilla y León, Spain: スペインカスティラ イ レoン
ja.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroñoは1166年にRodrigo Fernández de ToroñoとAldonza Pérez de Carriónの娘として生まれた。彼女はGonzalo Ruiz de Ceballosとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1209年にスペインで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño(은)는 1166년 Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño(와)과 Aldonza Pérez de Carrión의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1209년 스페인에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño nasceu em 1166 filha de Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño e Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas com Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1209, em Espanha, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño родилась в 1166 г. Её родителей звали Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño и Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей от Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. Она умерла около 1209 г. в местности Испания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sancha Rodriguez de Toroño nació en 1166 como hija de Rodrigo Fernández de Toroño y Aldonza Pérez de Carrión. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas con Gonzalo Ruiz de Ceballos. Murió aproximadamente 1209, en España, a la edad de 44 años.
